'''Nanja flies''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Diet/Legends|carnivorous]] [[Fly/Legends|fly]] native to the underground caverns of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Csilla/Legends|Csilla]].<ref name="CSWE" /> The creatures [[Diet/Legends|ate]] carrion.<ref name="Force Heretic III">''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]''</ref>

{{Creature-stub}}
